raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "The client just gave a tight deadline for a brand redesign, and the designer has been pulling late nights to finish mockups while juggling his part‑time freelance gigs. His thyroid symptoms have flared up again, leaving him feeling weak and unable to focus, and he’s barely sleeping more than a few hours a night.",
  "mental_state": "Stressed and tired; feeling like he’s constantly playing catch‑up with both work and his health.",
  "mood": "anxious and exhausted",
  "emotions": ["anxious", "frustrated", "fatigued"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["work_stress", "sleep_problems", "health_anxiety"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The looming project deadline and worsening thyroid symptoms have made the lack of sleep and work pressure immediate concerns, prompting him to seek support today."
}

raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "The client just extended the deadline for a large branding project, demanding a new logo and a full style guide in a week. He also has a scheduled thyroid check-up tomorrow, which he’s worried will reveal a flare‑up. His usual gym sessions have slipped, and he’s been feeling restless and unable to focus on the design work.",
  "mental_state": "A mix of professional pressure and health anxiety is clouding his thoughts; he’s questioning whether he can keep up with the workload while staying physically okay.",
  "mood": "anxious and restless",
  "emotions": ["anxious", "frustrated", "self-conscious"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["work_stress", "health_anxiety", "body_image_concerns"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The tight project deadline combined with a looming thyroid appointment and the loss of his gym routine make work stress, health worries, and body image concerns feel urgent and unmanageable today."
}
